content:
# Generated Built-in Plugin Inventory

This file is generated from the built-in capability descriptors.

Built-ins are declared as capability-scoped descriptors and are only materialized when a runtime enables those capabilities.

Default runtime capabilities are `coding` and `character`; `admin` stays separate unless explicitly enabled.
